name: 100% Whole Wheat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in 2/3 cup water while your milk is cooling.
2. Dissolve 1 cup sugar in the hot milk. Stir all ingredients together in a large bowl, adding flour if needed. Mix until smooth and free of lumps.
3. Knead dough on a lightly floured surface for about 5 minutes, adding flour as necessary to prevent sticking.
4. Let dough rise until doubled in size, approximately 1 1/2 to 2 hours.
5. Punch down the dough and shape it into 6 loaves. Place in greased pans and let rise until doubled in size again.
6. Bake at 375°F for 40 minutes.
7. Turn bread out onto a wire rack and allow to cool completely before slicing. If desired, you can freeze any leftover dough for later use.
